## Type of Change
<!-- Check all boxes that apply using [x] -->
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes a typo or inaccurate command)
- [ ] New feature (adds a new section, chapter, or protocol explanation)
- [ ] Documentation/Formatting update (improving readability, fixing markdown)
- [ ] Major rewrite (a significant overhaul of an existing chapter)

## Verification & Testing
<!-- Technical accuracy is critical. Please describe how you verified your changes. -->
- [ ] I have tested these commands on a simulator/emulator (e.g., Cisco Packet Tracer, GNS3, Eve-NG) or real hardware.
- [ ] The formatting matches the project's `_template.md` blueprint.

## Contributor Checklist:
- [ ] I have read the `CONTRIBUTING.md` guidelines.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own content.
- [ ] I have added comments to complex command explanations.
- [ ] My changes generate no new markdown formatting errors.
